title: Chapter 10 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)

{{Quote|Anakin Skywalker is leading the Clone Army in a fierce space battle when a mysterious ship engages him. When the pilot, mysterious Dark Jedi Asajj Ventress, leaps into hyperspace, the impetuous young Jedi follows, ignoring Obi-Wan's orders.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/10.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Ten (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 10'''" is the tenth episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, and the tenth episode in [[Clone Wars: Season One|Season One]] and [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[November 20]], [[2003]].

==Plot summary==
A massive [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|battle]] rages above [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], with [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] leading [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|V-19 Torrent starfighters]] in his customized [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighter]], ''[[Azure Angel]]''. A huge number of [[Nantex-class territorial defense starfighter/Legends|Geonosian starfighters]] join the battle, and Skywalker orders [[Red Leader (Muunilinst)|"Red Leader"]] to fire his missiles over the bow of a [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|Republic assault ship]]. The baffled [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and his fellows obey and Skywalker leads the cloud of enemy [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] around the ship into the missiles. With the remaining missiles still chasing him, Skywalker leads them into the docking bay of a [[InterGalactic Banking Clan gun platform/Legends|Muunilinst gun platform]], destroying it.

A [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|mysterious starfighter]] appears out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], firing into the Republic fleet and obliterating [[Blue Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Blue Squadron]]. Skywalker warns the clone pilots of the new arrival: "This one's mine." But what Skywalker does not know is that the ship is being piloted by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]].
